next_phase.Title: Platinum Readiness Tiering & Evidence Sufficiency Scoring
next_phase.Purpose: Score all 102 product assets for identity, evidence, safety, regulatory clarity, supplier data and commercial readiness.
next_phase.Permanent UAI Plan: Audit/system build; no product-family UAI allocation.

next_phase.Title: Tier 1 Primary-Source Extraction & Living Evidence Upgrade
next_phase.Purpose: Perform complete primary-source extraction for the highest-readiness authorised or late-stage assets.
next_phase.Permanent UAI Plan: Allocate only required supporting knowledge objects.

next_phase.Title: Supplier Evidence Request & Product Passport Submission Standard
next_phase.Purpose: Create manufacturer questionnaires, certificate requirements, analytical acceptance criteria and rejection rules.

next_phase.Title: Commercial Release Gate & Marketplace Activation Standard
next_phase.Purpose: Define evidence, legal, quality, labelling and human-review gates before marketplace or direct-sale activation.
next_phase.Permanent UAI Plan: System and marketplace governance objects only where justified.
